boundary_binding.action_boundary: May procurement release the near-threshold renewal?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Delegation DEL-WRE-077 matches vendor Wren Services, 12-month term, and USD 50000 ceiling. Signature dated 2026-06-27 precedes action date 2026-06-28. Policy STD-WRE-077-P confirms committee review is not required below the ceiling.
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: DEL-WRE-077 and STD-WRE-077-P confirm exact match criteria are met. The near-threshold proximity does not create a source-record defect requiring escalation.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: WARN-WRE-077 note does not block release as the renewal amount USD 49750 is below the USD 50000 ceiling and policy explicitly exempts committee review below this threshold.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Delegation signed 2026-06-27, before action date 2026-06-28. Ceiling USD 50000 covers renewal amount USD 49750. All timing, scope, and authority criteria satisfied.

final_answer: The action may proceed. Delegation DEL-WRE-077 precisely matches the renewal requirements for vendor, term, and ceiling, and was signed before the release date. Policy STD-WRE-077-P confirms no committee review is required below the ceiling. The warning note WARN-WRE-077 does not block this near-threshold renewal, as all exact-boundary criteria are satisfied and the policy explicitly exempts committee review below the USD 50000 ceiling.
